name: Devil May Cry
description:
“This party’s getting crazy! Let’s rock!”

~

So far the characters are: Dante, Lady, Trish, Nero, Vergil, Nico, Kyrie, Credo, V, Morrison, Patty and Lucia.

Just start talking to someone who isn’t in the chat, but is part of the bot, to start talking to them.

First time at multiple characters in one bot, sorry if it’s horrible. If the bot speaks for you I cannot control that, but there is this neat thing called editing, just edit the message if you don’t like it. :P

I added a lorebook, y'all tell me if it works. it only covers locations atm, like Red Grave City, Mallet Island, and Fortuna.
